name: Cannon
description: Cannon is a Jakobs assault rifle variant that lobs explosive, gravity-affected shells, consuming 2 rounds per trigger pull. Each shot can bounce once off surfaces, then explodes on hitting an enemy or on the next impact. Damage is dealt as splash-based gun damage, favouring careful arcs and bank shots over typical hitscan rifle aim.
notes: The explosion radius is modest, and the long post-bounce travel often helps avoid self-damage. Despite its explosive shots, it can scale with some gun damage bonuses. It tends to sell for more than expected for its level. Shots can be absorbed as rocket ammo by absorb shields due to its barrel behaviour. It does not spawn in white rarity.
